summary: HIV sentinel surveillance primarily monitors disease trends and identifies high-risk populations for tracking health issues among specific demographics. This approach does not aim to provide precise incidence rates but focuses instead on ongoing trend analysis and targeted public health interventions based on observed patterns. \boxed{}
